text.title: multimodal-vui-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for multimodal-vui-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: AI-generated flow spec misses state sync when user speaks while simultaneously touching.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Multimodal state sync on simultaneous input is an edge case agent-generated specs routinely miss. Add it as an explicit review checklist item in every multimodal spec review.

failure-mode.description: Using Echo Show APL templates on Google Nest Hub without adaptation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: APL is Amazon-specific; Google uses Action Builder with Rich Responses and Canvas. Platform-specific templates require separate implementations. Simulator rendering also differs from actual hardware.

failure-mode.description: Agent-generated APL JSON using deprecated APL version features.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: APL evolves between versions. Without specifying the exact target APL version in the prompt, agents default to older patterns that fail on current firmware.

failure-mode.description: Confusing "fallback" (user cannot use primary input) with "error" (input understood but failed).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fallback paths handle inability to use a modality; error paths handle understood-but-failed interactions. Conflating them produces flows where errors are handled with the wrong recovery mechanism.

failure-mode.description: Wake-word false positives disrupting visual UI experience.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI cannot solve wake-word false positive rate at the UX layer — this is a hardware problem. Design visual UI to be resilient to unexpected voice activation, with visible state indicators when VUI is active.

failure-mode.description: VUI timeout set too short for complex visual content without accessibility consideration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Default timeouts from agent-generated specs are typically optimized for average users. Elderly users and users with cognitive disabilities need at minimum 10s for simple responses, 60s for multi-step forms.
